backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a lead management system with submit, delete, and query operations, storing leads in a map keyed by email and including blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (language context, language switcher, translations file, component i18n updates) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their purpose, styling, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order within a LanguageProvider context, including the floating WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Scroll-triggered animated banner section promoting bank financing, featuring stats cards, a shimmer overlay, and a WhatsApp CTA button, with i18n support via useTranslation.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component with a hover tooltip, linking to the business WhatsApp number with translated aria-label.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer displaying brand info, contact details (phones, email, address, service area, hours), and a bottom bar with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution, fully i18n-enabled.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with brand logo, desktop/mobile nav links, language switcher (English/Hindi/Odia), and a 'Get Quote' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background solar image, headline/tagline from i18n, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a secondary scroll-to-scheme link.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Contact/inquiry form with name, phone, email, city, system size, and message fields that validates inputs and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on submission.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha solar installation phases, an intersection-observer-animated subsidy tier breakdown, and supporting guide content from i18n translations.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Three-column section presenting PM Surya Ghar scheme benefits, eligibility criteria, and a step-by-step application process, with a CTA linking to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-card grid showcasing domestic and commercial solar services with images, feature lists, and individual CTA buttons linking to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Three-card warranty/guarantee section using Shield, Zap, and Wrench icons to highlight product and service assurances from i18n translation data.
Prominent green gradient CTA section displaying the business WhatsApp number and a direct link to open a WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with three icon-based cards (Shield, Wrench, Smile) using translated content from the i18n system.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the app's language state ('en', 'hi', 'od') with persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitLead` mutation hook that submits a lead form to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the 'leads' query on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains all UI text translations for English, Hindi, and Odia, covering sections like header, hero, PM scheme info, Odisha guide, and more.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently selected language by combining `useLanguage` and the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, dark mode), Tailwind directives, custom utility classes, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (solar, charcoal), CSS variable-driven semantic colors, custom fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3 for TRI-GITA SERVICES, recording four completed multilingual i18n features (language context, switcher UI, translations file, component updates) and one pending feature request for English/Hindi/Odia support.
